problem_statement: Real Estate Prices, Property Features, and Market Data. A real estate analyst wants to build and evaluate linear regression models to understand property pricing drivers.
question: Fit an OLS linear regression of sale_price on all numeric features (sqft, bedrooms, bathrooms, year_built, lot_acres, garage_spaces, renovated, distance_miles, months_listed) using the train split. Evaluate on the test split. Report the test-set RMSE rounded to the nearest $1000 as a plain integer (e.g. 33000).
agent_instructions: The data source is a directory of CSV files. Inspect only the files needed for the question and compute the answer directly in notebook code. Use sklearn LinearRegression for fitting and sklearn mean_squared_error for evaluation.
